arts.ttl: Newcastle set to announce striker signing from English club
arts.sum: As Newcastle United continue to develop under Eddie Howe, Paul Mitchell and the Saudi Public Investment Fund (PIF), it seems to be vital that the club retains an English core of players. Whilst foreign talent can often be cheaper both in terms of any sale price as well as their weekly wage, often those players […] The post Newcastle set to announce striker signing from English club appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle at the mercy of FFP again as European giants lurk in the shadows for key man
arts.sum: For most of the summer transfer window it seemed that Newcastle might lose one of their major stars because of the need to stay on the right side of Financial Fair Play. As it turned out, not only did Eddie Howe keep hold of the likes of Bruno Guimaraes and Alexander Isak, but they were […] The post Newcastle at the mercy of FFP again as European giants lurk in the shadows for key man appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle are striving to close the gap on Man City and Arsenal – Eddie Howe
arts.sum: The Magpies go into this weekend’s fixtures sitting third in the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe insists 'the club is unified' despite lingering tension with sporting director Paul Mitchell after he hit out at the Magpies' transfer strategy
arts.sum: CRAIG HOPE: Newcastle can go top of the Premier League with victory at Fulham on Saturday, despite lingering tension behind the scenes.

arts.ttl: Newcastle troubles “don’t surprise” Collymore and “would be ridiculous” for club to rely on key man
arts.sum: Newcastle United have begun their 2024/25 Premier League season in fine fashion, with Eddie Howe guiding his side to an unbeaten start. Four games in and the Magpies have beaten Southampton, Tottenham Hotspur and Wolverhampton Wanderers, and drawn with Bournemouth. For all intents and purposes, the North East giants are once again a team going […] The post Newcastle troubles “don’t surprise” Collymore and “would be ridiculous” for club to rely on key man appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: William Osula on standby to face Fulham with Newcastle United sweating on Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Speaking about his options, Howe said: "That leaves Anthony, who did a really good job against Wolves, and Willl Osula, who has done really well since he's been with us. The ball grazed his eye and we felt at the time that was the main reason for him coming off but he also got a foot injury in that first half.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United to make late Alexander Isak decision for Fulham clash
arts.sum: Newcastle United will run late checks on Alexander Isak ahead of the trip to face Fulham on Saturday. Isak did not get a great deal of service against Wolves before being substituted with an eye injury but since then there have been reports of a toe problem.

arts.ttl: Paul Mitchell's biggest move at Newcastle as 'great addition' secured
arts.sum: Before a summer of change at Monaco, in 2020, when Bunce, sporting director Paul Mitchell and new manager Niko Kovac all arrived, the Ligue 1 side ranked 76th for total distance covered, 85th for high-speed running and 88th for accelerations in Europe's top five leagues. Well, few are better placed to comment than Yann Le Meur, who worked alongside Bunce as Monaco's head of athletic development, before succeeding the Englishman as the club's performance director.

arts.ttl: Liverpool great 'lost his head', took top off and waited for me in the Newcastle tunnel
arts.sum: Now former Newcastle United defender James Perch has spoken about the afternoon Pepe Reina 'wanted to kill' him. There were 82 minutes on the clock at St James' and Newcastle were 2-0 up against Liverpool .
